## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss project updates, migration concerns, and next steps for Innerwell's content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sessions are increasing across the board, indicating positive progress](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Manual updates required for 303 city-level pages, including new insurance block and indexing checks](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Blog revamp in progress, with migration and design adjustments ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Concerns raised about migration risks and potential impact on paid media campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

## Topics

### Project Updates

  - [City-level pages:](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
      - [New insurance block to be manually updated across 303 pages](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
      - [Publisher checking indexing for all pages](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
      - [Ongoing project due to manual nature of updates](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Blog revamp:](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
      - [Content migration in progress](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
      - [New design includes "key point" section, absent in previous content](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
      - [Publisher can temporarily disable "key point" section for older posts](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
      - [Plan to add images between articles (retroactively and moving forward)](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

### Migration Concerns and Process

  - [Noa expressed concern about migration risks, especially with active paid media campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Dave explained typical migration process:](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
      - [GrowthX provides location list and redirect map](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
      - [Client's engineering team usually implements redirects at database level](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Dave offered to verify URLs used in paid media to avoid conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Akina to provide Dave access to Prismic for category structure verification](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [New category structure is live](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [URLs and content roadmap approved](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Next two editorial topics to be shared in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Condition Hub content pipeline to be built out](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)

### Design Feedback

  - [Dave reviewing Condition Hub design, feedback expected by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/ZxP45tLzCNfCbzrbsSQzkgkPAYqJ7uYs?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
